title: Troy McEachren joins McCarthy Tétrault as Firm Expands Charities and Private Wealth Expertise in Quebec
content:
## Troy McEachren joins McCarthy Tétrault as Firm Expands Charities and Private Wealth Expertise in Quebec
We are pleased to welcome Troy McEachren to the Firm as a Partner in Montréal, joining our Tier 1-ranked National Tax Group. Troy brings distinguished experience advising charities, foundations, and not-for-profit organizations. He will work closely with Robert Hayhoe and Nicole D’Aoust in our Charities and Non-Profits Group and will broaden the depth and scope of our robust Private Wealth, Estates and Trusts Group .
Widely regarded as a leading legal advisor in the charitable sector, Troy is nationally recognized for his expertise and is currently the highest-ranked Quebec lawyer in Chambers and Partners for charities and non-profits. He is also distinguished by Lexpert and Best Lawyers for his expertise in this area. He has extensive experience advising charities, foundations, and other tax-exempt organizations on governance, fiduciary obligations, and compliance with complex tax regulations, significantly enhancing our ability to serve philanthropic organizations in Quebec and across Canada.
In addition to his charities expertise, Troy maintains a broad trusts and estates practice, advising high-net-worth individuals, families, and trustees on succession planning, cross-border tax matters, and charitable giving. He further deepens our capabilities through his work on fiduciary obligations and estate litigation, strengthening our ability to serve private clients and family offices in Quebec while reinforcing our national private wealth platform.
Bilingual in English and French, and with recognized expertise across civil and common law, Troy offers clients seamless advice on governance, regulatory, and operational matters, as well as related tax matters. His arrival reflects McCarthy Tétrault’s continued investment in a fully integrated national tax practice that supports both charitable organizations and private clients with local insight and global reach.
“Troy brings exceptional expertise in the charitable and tax-exempt space, with a reputation for strategic insight and technical excellence,” said Raj Juneja , Co-Head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group. “His arrival deepens our ability to support philanthropic organizations with governance, compliance, and tax planning advice in Quebec and nationally.”
“Troy’s addition also strengthens our private wealth offering in Quebec, enhancing our ability to advise high-net-worth individuals, family offices, and trustees on complex trusts, estates, and cross-border planning,” added Brett Anderson , Co-Head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group. “His expertise further reinforces our integrated national tax platform and the value we deliver to private clients across Canada.”
“I’m thrilled to join McCarthy Tétrault and contribute to a national practice that reflects the evolving needs of charities and private clients,” said Troy . “The firm’s scale, collaborative culture, and multidisciplinary expertise make it the ideal platform to deliver high-value legal advice to organizations and families alike.”
To learn more about how Troy can support your organization’s mission with strategic, high-value legal advice, visit our Charities and Non-Profits Group page or our Private Wealth, Estates & Trusts Group page , or contact Troy .
Our National Tax Group is distinguished by the range and depth of its capabilities. In addition to Troy, we have recruited several creative and well-recognized practitioners in the last five years, expanding our reach and deepening our service offerings across Canada to provide clients with comprehensive advisory, transactional and litigation services.
McCarthy Tétrault’s superlative tax expertise and knowledge of Canada’s tax regime are widely recognized. Our team is distinguished by its winning combination of exceptional experience in tax planning and tax disputes, making us a formidable presence in the courtroom and the boardroom. Helping clients navigate the tax aspects of domestic and cross-border public and private mergers and acquisitions, corporate reorganizations, financings and securitizations, and other transactions, we bring clarity and pragmatism to complicated tax issues that could otherwise derail business goals. We also guide clients through the entire gamut of tax controversies, from audits, requests for information and objections to searches and seizures and appeals. In working with us, clients gain a team with experience on some of the most complex tax issues and precedent-setting cases across the country. Learn more about our Tax Practice .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Troy  McEachren Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
